case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. TECLA DURAN

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, TECLA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-16-2011
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DURAN, TECLA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 16192068) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, TECLA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED MAY-28-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, TECLA
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, TECLA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-09-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,050.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 16021005) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURAN, TECLA $3,340.38 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,340.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-09-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $223.54 AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, TECLA
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
